title: Repurposed Structures - Immersive Engineering Compat
description: Makes IE's houses spawn in RS villages
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Immersive Engineering. These large houses are hard to miss in RS Overworld Villages but they do include Immersive Engineering's workstations.

 
- Immersive Engineering mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Grn2JrYW/images/ca1a3e0aaaf68e763f6c034016eb23a3e3abdd6e.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Grn2JrYW/images/ca1a3e0aaaf68e763f6c034016eb23a3e3abdd6e.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
